official_functions.role: Encode and decode the serverbound keep-alive body
Name the packet id assigned in Configuration serverbound state

invariants: The official codec writes and reads the keep-alive payload id field in the packet body.
The keep-alive payload id is distinct from the Configuration serverbound packet table id.
The Configuration serverbound packet table owns the packet table id for minecraft:keep_alive.
This contract does not prove runtime echo behavior.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this codec contract to infer play-state keepalive or configuration-loop response behavior.
